§6Multi-Fluid Identifier§f

§aIdentify and pipe different fluid types throughout your factory.§f

The §bMulti-Fluid Identifier§f is a utility tool that displays information about fluids stored in connected tanks or pipes. It is essential for managing your chemical plant and oil refinery setups.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at the §bAssembly Machine§f.

§6Usage§f:
Right-click on a fluid-capable block (tank, pipe, machine) with the identifier to read the fluid type, amount, and temperature. This helps you verify that your pipe network is carrying the correct fluids.

§6Why You Need It§f:
§b• Oil processing§f: Identify crude oil vs. refined fractions
§b• Chemical plant§f: Verify chemical inputs and outputs
§b• Pipe debugging§f: Trace fluid routing issues

§eTip§f: Keep one in your hotbar when working with fluid systems. It is invaluable for troubleshooting pipe networks.
